title: Large-Format Unframed Reef Print – Kāneʻohe Bay Coral Garden, 20x30 in
description: A large-format fine-art photograph of a thriving coral garden in Kāneʻohe Bay, shot on one of my own dives just minutes from my Kailua home. Printed on archival matte paper, image size approximately 20x30 inches. The scene captures a healthy cauliflower and lobe coral community in soft morning light. Ships unframed, rolled in a rigid tube with a certificate of authenticity. A portion of every sale supports our reef recovery work.
tags: reef print,coral photography,Kaneohe Bay,ocean wall art,large format print,underwater photography,Hawaii print

title: Unframed Print – Green Sea Turtle (Honu) Over the Reef, 8x10 in
description: A serene underwater photograph of a green sea turtle (honu) gliding over the reef in Kāneʻohe Bay, captured on my Olympus TG-7 during a survey dive. Printed on archival lustre paper, image size 8x10 inches. Ships unframed in a protective photo sleeve with a rigid backing board, ready to frame. A calming reminder of the wildlife our reef work protects.
tags: honu print,sea turtle photography,ocean wall art,reef print,underwater photo,Hawaii turtle,coral recovery

title: Reef-Safe Mineral Sunscreen Set (4 tins) – Non-Nano Zinc, Ocean-Friendly
description: A set of four reef-safe mineral sunscreen tins formulated with non-nano zinc oxide and skin-loving botanicals — free of oxybenzone and octinoxate, and compliant with Hawaii's reef protection laws. Broad-spectrum protection for your dives and beach days. Each tin is approximately 2 oz. Reef-safe sun care from a marine biologist who cares about what washes off your skin. Part of every sale supports coral recovery.
tags: reef safe sunscreen,mineral sunscreen,zinc sunscreen,ocean friendly,Hawaii reef protection,sun care set,gift set

title: Unframed Reef Print – Cauliflower Coral Colony, 12x16 in

Ships unframed in a photo sleeve with backing board, ready to frame. No two reef moments are ever the same.

title: Framed Print – Coral Nursery & Outplanting, Coral Recovery Series, 11x14 in

title: SALE: Overstock Unframed Print – Minor Cosmetic Flaw
description: An unframed fine-art reef or ocean print from my catalog with a small cosmetic imperfection such as a slight edge scuff, a faint handling mark in the border, or a minor color variation. title: Custom Print Commission Deposit – Framed or Large-Format Photography
description: 50% deposit to begin a custom print commission.
